name: Apple Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour and butter. Press into a greased baking dish.
2. In a separate bowl, combine apples, sugar, and cinnamon.
3. Spread the apple mixture on top of the crust.
4. Dot with small pieces of butter.
5. Cover with foil.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. Remove from oven and remove foil.
8. In a separate bowl, beat together Half and Half, eggs, and cornstarch until smooth.
9. Pour over the warm apples.
10. Return to oven and bake an additional 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
